message:
feat(sync,grpc): add Notify, OnceCell primitives and gRPC health/interceptors

Sync primitives (asupersync-azw):
- Add Notify for async event signaling with stored notifications
- Add OnceCell for lazy async initialization with cancel safety
- Export new primitives from sync module

gRPC enhancements (asupersync-y1xw):
- Add health checking service
- Add interceptor framework for middleware

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
